sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21561" key="gamhsei/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰμ-ησείω</orth>, Desiderat. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαμέω</foreign>, <sense id="n21561.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wish to marry</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
